mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_class(class_name, state, coordinator, level, course_level, attend_count, class_days, start_date, end_date, department, location) VALUES(#{className}, #{state}, #{coordinator}, #{level}, #{courseLevel}, #{attendCount}, #{classDays}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{department}, #{location})
mapper.update: UPDATE training_class SET class_name = #{className}, state = #{state}, coordinator = #{coordinator}, level = #{level}, course_level = #{courseLevel}, attend_count = #{attendCount}, class_days = #{classDays}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, department = #{department}, location = #{location} WHERE class_no = #{classNo}
mapper.select: SELECT class_no, class_name, state, coordinator, level, course_level, attend_count, class_days, start_date, end_date, department, location FROM training_class
SELECT class_no, class_name, state, coordinator, level, course_level, attend_count, class_days, start_date, end_date, department, location FROM training_class WHERE class_no = #{classNo}
